name: Suspicious WMI Execution Detected
description: Detection of suspicious WMI commands, including antivirus product enumeration and remote process creation. Adversaries often use WMI for various malicious activities such as reconnaissance, execution, and defense evasion.

prompts.prompt: An alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: a process, **{process}**, executed a suspicious WMI command line: **{command}**. This activity is a strong indicator of **Suspicious WMI Execution** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1047**), which can be used for reconnaissance, remote execution, or defense evasion. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to determine if it is related to a possible security incident. The event occurred under the user **{user}**.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: process
parameters.description: The name of the process that executed the command, which is expected to be 'wmic.exe'.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The full command line that was executed.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that performed the action.
